title: linaria × kocianovichii
intro: Linaria × kocianovichii, also known as Toadflax, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including relieving congestion, soothing sore throats, and reducing fever. To utilize its medicinal properties, Toadflax can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
